title: Chapter 7: A Summer Walking the Footprints of History

text_block_list.text:
It was right before the summer training camp. I was talking to 
Chrono Genesis about how she planned to spend her day off.
choice_data_list: You have somewhere you want to go?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yes… There's an abandoned racecourse 
close by enough for a day trip by train…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
It was shut down a long time ago, but countless battles were 
fought there… I've been interested in it for a while…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: And so… umm… Well………

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer, would you like… to come with me…?
choice_data_list: Are you sure you want me to tag along?
Are you sure you want me to tag along?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yes. Well, there's nothing there now, but… 
From a historical perspective, I believe it's a very 
significant place…!
choice_data_list: Sounds great, let's go together then.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …! Y-Yes…!
And so, on one of our rest days at the summer training camp…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
U-Umm… Please take a look at this. 
It's a summary… of the racecourse we're visiting.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
It has information on the course's origins and race results. 
Well… just the parts I could find, anyway…
choice_data_list: Did you put all this together, Chrono?
Did you put all this together, Chrono?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yes…! I thought you might enjoy it more if you had 
some background knowledge beforehand… So I…
choice_data_list: Thank you, this is a huge help!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Really…!? ……I'm glad…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… We still have some time before the train arrives. 
I'll go buy us drinks.

We got off at the station nearest our destination and walked 
along a path surrounded by fields, the scent of grass lingering 
in the air. However, walking in silence was a bit boring, so…
choice_data_list: Rock, paper… scissors!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… I win…! Umm… G-R-A-D-E-D R-A-C-E……

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Hehe. This is a close contest. We're neck-and-neck…!
choice_data_list: (She's certainly having a good time…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Oh yeah, I believe just ahead here…… ah.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Trainer… would you like to take a detour to that shrine 
over there? It also has strong ties to racing…
choice_data_list: Then whoever gets there first wins!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… Are you sure? I'll end up waiting for you there. 
Alright then…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ready, set…… go!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Phew.
choice_data_list: <size=36>Aaaah, the shade of these trees feels great…!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Yes… It's really revitalizing.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… That's right. This shrine… it used to be famous as a place 
to pray for victory in battles. They say the competitors of that 
era would always come pray here before a race.
choice_data_list: That's neat…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
It must have been so lively… With lots of supporters 
coming here, too…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
But the desire to win was no different from today… 
They held all the same, earnest feelings we do…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… It's strange. Even though they lived 
so long ago, I somehow feel close to them…
choice_data_list: (They were just like us, huh…)
(They were just like us, huh…)

text_block_list.text:
We left the shrine and continued walking, 
making our way through the long, long path 
to finally arrive at our destination…

……There was nothing there. Well, to be more precise, 
there was only a small memorial monument.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
……I'm sorry. Umm, it's a lot more… simple of a historical site 
than I expected…
choice_data_list: <size=34>But you can still feel the traces of what used to be</size>.

text_block_list.text:
The shrubs growing along the path… they're probably 
the remnants of the course. Thanks to her summary, 
I could vividly imagine what it looked like back then.
choice_data_list: I bet that area over there was the homestretch…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Then… the gates would be around here… the fan's cheers 
rumbling over the track from that direction……

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Seconds before the start… heart pounding… filled with hope and 
excitement for a possible victory… and a little bit of anxiety……

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
……Rounding the fourth corner, into the homestretch… 
Burning to cross the finish line in first place. Because there's 
someone you want to do it for…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
That's what it must have been like… So many faces transformed 
into joyful smiles, so many tears shed… Well, umm… I'm just 
fantasizing out loud here.
choice_data_list: No, I get it.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Hmm…?
choice_data_list: From the supporting side, I understand too…
From the supporting side, I understand too…

text_block_list.text:
I let my thoughts wander, envisioning the trainers of that era. 
Imagining them watching their horsegirls with care and love… 
filled me with a sense of determination.
choice_data_list: It's almost like… we're connected through history.
It's almost like… we're connected through history.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…That's true… Trainer, you're looking 
at the same world as I am…
choice_data_list: …Chrono?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah…! Umm, I'm going to go take some pictures over there…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (I-I ran away… Was that too sudden? But…)
I had fun too, and really felt your passion all day long!
I had fun too, and really felt your passion all day long!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (They were… really serious. Trainer…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (They're really doing their best… trying to get to know me…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (……I don't want to forget this time, this place.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Being here today… might be too small of an event 
to warrant a page in history, but…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Just like the people… who once built a memorial on this land…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (I want to give form… to the time period that is today…)
(Click)

While waiting for the train home, Chrono Genesis 
was reviewing the photos she had taken.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
This one… I wish I had paid more attention to the composition. 
The background could have had a stronger bokeh effect…
choice_data_list: But it still looks incredibly beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Y-You think so…? 
Hehe… Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Umm, let's see, the next one……

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Huh? Is this… you, Trainer…?
choice_data_list: What's wrong?
What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
N-No… umm, it's nothing…! Ah… the train's coming, 
so that's enough of that…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(When did I even take that photo…? Regardless… it's rude 
of me, so I'll have to delete it later…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (……But… I still really want one… Just one photo…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Umm…! Trainer, if you don't mind…!
